intro: 6 easy problems that drill the Heap / Priority Queue pattern — ideal for focused practice sessions.

faqs.question: Why practice easy Heap / Priority Queue problems?
faqs.answer: Difficulty-scoped drills lock the pattern before you mix constraints on harder variants.
